return(function(...)local c,b do local L,p,R,a,Z=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function W(c,b)local p=0 for R=0,7,1 do local a=c/2+b/2 if a~=L(a)then p=p+2^R end c=L(c/2)b=L(b/2)end return p end local n,F="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\155\130\024\206\200\133\207\019\165\003\027\018\030\158\162\002\026\166\005\231\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local T=65 local f=1732 local e=true local function B(c)local B={}for b=1,#c,2 do local L=Z(c,b,b+1)B[#B+1]=a(L,16)end local S={}for c=0,3,1 do local b=B[c+1]local L=((b-f)+256)%256 local p=R(n,c%16+1)local a=R(F,c%T+1)S[c+1]=W(W(L,p),a)end local N=((S[1]+S[2]*256)+S[3]*65536)+S[4]*16777216 local h={}for c=1,N,1 do local b=B[c+4]if e and c%2==0 then b=(b%16)*16+L(b/16)end local a=((b-f)+256)%256 local
